activity: #  WORKFLOW CONFIG  —  OPTIONAL OVERRIDE FILE
#  This file is OPTIONAL. Only use it if your operation differs from the
#  default plug-and-perf workflow. If it is absent
#  built-in sequence automatically.
#  To activate: save this file as  workflow_config.csv  in the same folder
#  as your master_risks_assumptions.csv
#  Each row = one activity in the operational sequence.
#  Row order within each phase controls execution order.
#  COLUMN EDITABILITY GUIDE
#  activity   [FREE TEXT] Short name shown in the Workflow tab and audit output.
#             Edit freely. Must be unique within the file.
#  phase      [LOCKED VALUES] Controls when the activity runs relative to frac.
#             Allowed values — use exactly as shown:
#               pre_frac    runs before the stage loop (once per well)
#               frac_stage  runs inside the stage loop (repeats per stage)
#               post_frac   runs after all stages are complete (once per well)
#  resource   [LOCKED VALUES] Determines which resource pool this activity consumes.
#             Allowed values — use exactly as shown:
#               Frac fleet
#               Wireline
#               CT / cleanout
#               Milling
#               Testing unit
#             To add a new resource type
phase: a code change is required in

activity: #             simulation_engine.R (RESOURCE_CLASS_CONFIG).
#  duration_source  [SYNTAX LOCKED] Where the activity duration comes from.
#             Allowed syntax — use exactly one of these forms:
#               param:<name>      look up by variable name in master_risks_assumptions.csv
#               formula:<expr>    evaluated per-well using the variables below
#               historical        resampled from historical_wells.csv column
#             Available formula variables:
#               n_stages               final stage count (after risk adjustments)
#               n_plugs                plug count (stages + extra plugs)
#               wireline_time_per_stage  from sidebar (days)
#               frac_time_per_stage      from sidebar (days)
#               frac_settling_time       from sidebar (days)
#               milling_days_per_plug    sampled from historical distribution (days)
#               flowback_days            sampled from flowback min/max (days)
#               temp_log_days            temp_log_count × temp_log_duration (days)
#               isolation_plug_days      from assumptions CSV (days)
#  conditional  [LOCKED VALUES or BLANK] Leave blank = activity always runs.
#               Allowed values — use exactly as shown:
#                 !cement_eval_offline   activity skipped if cement eval runs offline
#                 temp_log               only for wells that have temperature log stages
#                 is_zipper              only active in zipper frac mode
#                 is_first_on_pad        only for the first well on each pad
#                 !is_first_on_pad       for every well except the first on each pad
#  path_type  [LOCKED VALUES] Controls whether this activity extends the schedule.
#               sequential   adds to the resource workload path (extends campaign)
#               parallel     absorbed into available time (does not extend schedule
#                            if spare capacity exists — e.g. CT during adjacent frac)
#  notes      [FREE TEXT] Description shown in the Workflow tab. Edit freely.
#  DEFAULT WORKFLOW  (plug-and-perf completion)
#  Modify rows below to match your operation. Only change what differs.
CT cleanout / scraper
notes: CT scraper run to clean wellbore before completions. Set duration to 0 in assumptions to disable.

activity: Cement evaluation
notes: Cement evaluation log via CT. Skipped when cement eval runs offline (controlled by assumptions CSV probability).

activity: Pad-to-pad move
notes: Full rig-down + transport + rig-up when moving to a new pad. Time set in sidebar.

activity: Within-pad well transition
notes: Short skid or lateral move to next wellhead on same pad. Time set in sidebar.

activity: Perforate stage
notes: Wireline perforation run per stage. Time set in sidebar.

activity: Set isolation plug
notes: Set isolation plug before next perforation run.

activity: Temperature log
notes: Optional temperature survey. Only for stages selected in campaign setup.

activity: Pump stage
notes: Full stage cycle: pump + fluid loading + iron rig-up/down + pressure test + flush. Time set in sidebar.

activity: Frac settling
notes: Pressure bleed-off before wireline re-entry. Time set in sidebar.

activity: Mill out plugs
notes: Drill out all isolation plugs. Starts when well is frac-released AND milling + testing units are free.

activity: Flowback + well test
notes: Post-frac flowback and pressure build-up test. Testing unit held from milling start until flowback complete.

activity: #  EXAMPLE MODIFICATIONS  (uncomment and adapt as needed)
#  Add a production logging run before milling:
#  PLT run
#  Temperature log via CT instead of wireline:
#  Temperature log
notes: Temperature log via CT combined spread

activity: #  Parallel activity that does not extend the schedule:
#  Fluid sampling
notes: Fluid sample collected during milling window

activity: #  Remove an activity entirely: delete its row.
#  Disable an activity without removing: set its duration to 0 in master_risks_assumptions.csv.
